testo_originale: venerdì 16 agosto 2024 Qual è stata una decisione difficile che sei felice di aver preso ultimamente? Come hai deciso cosa fare? this summer i decided to cut all my friends off even though it’s the hardest thing i had to do, i feel as though if i didn’t i’d be 10x more miserable than i am right now. it was something i really wanted to do since December of last year and was actually going pretty good until it was one of my friend’s birthday and was forced to see them, and even if i was reconsidering everything, those 3 days spent together reminded me of why i wanted to do it in the first place. i’m glad i cut contact which them even though it ment being alone because this feeling is only temporary but them being themselves is forever and that’s all i need to know. i think now, when i see them hang out together and not invite me even though it’s exactly what i wanted, it still stings a little but but at the same time it’s only affecting me because i’m the loneliest i’ve ever been in my life and it a few weeks when i’m back to seeing my uni friends it won’t bother me as much. and after i graduate i’ll leave this shithole of a town and go anywhere else; rome, milan, london- anywhere, and start over and not remember anyone’s name.
